howItWorks.intro: This walking calorie calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Individual results vary based on metabolism, genetics, and activity level. Consult your doctor before starting any program.

faq.question: How many calories does walking burn?
faq.answer: A 170 lb person walking at 3.5 mph burns about 300 calories per hour. Faster pace and higher body weight increase the burn.

faq.question: How many steps in a mile?
faq.answer: Approximately 2,000 steps per mile at average stride length. Taller people take fewer steps, shorter people take more.

faq.question: Is walking good exercise?
faq.answer: Walking is excellent low-impact exercise. 30 minutes daily reduces heart disease risk by 19%, improves mood, and burns meaningful calories. 10,000 steps/day is a good target.

faq.question: Walking vs running for weight loss?
faq.answer: Running burns more calories per minute, but walking is sustainable for longer. Net calorie burn per mile is similar. Walking has lower injury risk.
